text: polos shelicha yeshu'a hamashicha biretson elohim vetimotios achinu el-qehilat elohim asher beqorinetos 'im kal-haqedshim asher baakhaya
chesed lakhem veshalom meet haelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
barukh haelohim vaavi adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha av harachamim velohey kal-nechama
hamenachem otanu bekhal-lachatsenu lema'an nachem hanilechatsim kal-lachats banechama asher anachenu menuchamim meet haelohim
ki kerov 'inuyey hamashicha banu ken tirebe nechamatenu 'al-yedey hamashicha

veim-nilechatsim anachenu nilachets ba'avur nechamatekhem vishu'atekhem veim-menuchamim anachenu nenucham ba'avur nechamatekhem kedey shetaarikhu gam-atem nafeshekhem be'unotekhem ha'inuyim asher me'unim anachenu
venakhon libenu batucha 'aleykhem veyada'enu ki kaasher 'inuyeynu 'inuyeykhem ken nechamatenu nechamatekhem
ki lo-nekhached mikem achay et-tsaratenu asher metsaatenu beaseya limeod kemasa khaved kaveda mimenu 'ad ki-noashenu mechayeynu
vaanachenu vilevavenu charatsenu lanu et-hamavet lema'an asher-lo nivetach benafeshenu ki im-belohim hamechaye et-hametim
asher hitsilanu min-hamita hachamura hazot ve'odenu matsil velo anachenu meqavim sheyosif lehatsilenu
ba'azarekhem gam-atem otanu bitefilatekhem lema'an yodu rabim ba'avurenu 'al-matenat hachesed shehayeta lanu 'al-yedey rabim
ki zot hi tehilatenu asher libenu ya'id banu ki betom veysher lifeney elohim hitehalakhenu va'olam af ki-itekhem lo-vechakhemat habasar ki im-bechesed elohim
ki lo-nikhetov lakhem ki im-mah-sheatem qoreim vegam-mevinim
uvatucha ani bakhem sheyeda'etem otanu me'at veaf-tede'u 'ad-takhelit ki anachenu tehilatekhem kaasher gam-atem tehilatenu beyom adoneynu yeshu'a
uvabitachon haze chafatseti lavo aleykhem rishona ulema'an teqabelu tova khefula
la'avor betokhakhem el-maqedoneya velashuv mimaqedoneya aleykhem veatem teshalechuni el-erets yehuda
ve'ata hehayeta 'atsati nimehara o ya'atseti lefi habasar et-asher ya'atseti vehaya etseli pa'am hen hen ufa'am lo lo
akhen neeman haelohim ki-devarenu aleykhem lo haya hen valo
ki ven-haelohim yeshu'a hamashicha haniqera vetokhakhem 'al-yadeynu 'al-yadi ve'al-yedey silevanos vetimotios hu lo haya hen valo ki-haya vo hen bilevad
ki kal-havetachot haelohim kulan bo hayu hen uvo hayu amen likhevod haelohim 'al-yadeynu
vehaelohim hu hamekhonen otanu itekhem bamashicha vaasher meshachanu
hu gam-chatamanu veet-rucho natan belibenu le'eravon
vaani et-elohim eqera liheyot 'ed lenafeshi ki mechemelati 'aleykhem lo-vati 'ad-hena leqorinetos
lo shemshelim anachenu beemunatekhem ki im-'ozerim lesimechatekhem ki 'amadetem baemuna
vaani gamareti velibi levileti shuv-'od aleykhem be'atsavet
ki im-ani a'atsivekhem mi efo yesamecheni bileti im-hane'etsav 'al-yadi
vezot kataveti lakhem pen-avo vehayah-li 'etseev meotam asher hayah-li lisemocha 'aleyhem uvotecha ani bekhulekhem shesimechati hi simechat kulekhem
ki merov tsara umetsuqat libi kataveti lakhem uvidema'ot harebe velo leha'atsivekhem raq lema'an tede'u haahava hayetera asher ahaveti etekhem
veim-he'etsiv ish lo-oti he'etsiv ela khulekhem veshel-aferiz 'al-hamida omar miqetsatekhem
vedayo leoto haish hatokhecha hahi mipi harabim
uvekhen lehefekh tiselechu utenachamu kedey shel yevula' haish be'itsevono ki rav hu
'al-ken avaqesha mikem shetiteya'atsu lehareoto ahava
ki lazot kataveti lema'an eda' et-tumatekhem im-bakol tishema'un
veish asher tiselechu lo eselach-lo gam-ani ki gam im-anokhi salacheti laish salacheti lo lema'anekhem lifeney hamashicha
pen-yone otanu hasatan ki lo-ne'elemu meitanu mezimotayv
vaani bevoi literoas levaser besorat hamashicha af ki-nifetach-li fetach baadoneynu
lo-hayeta revacha leruchi ki lo-matsati sham et-titos achi venifetareti mehem veyatsati lalekhet el-maqedoneya
aval todot lelohim hanoten lanu teshu'a vamashicha bekhal-'et umefits 'al-yadeynu et-reycha da'eto bekhal-maqom
ki-reycha nichocha shel-hamashicha anachenu lelohim betokh hanosha'im uvetokh haovedim
laele reycha mavet lamavet velaele reycha chayim lachayim umi-ze rauy lekhakh
ki eyn midatenu kemidat harabim ha'osim devar haelohim sechora ki im-mitokh ysher halev umeelohim lifeney elohim nedaber bamashicha
hanachel 'od leshabecha 'atsemenu haim-tserikhim anachenu kaacherim leigerot aleykhem o mikem mazekirot otanu lashevach
atem igaretenu haketuva bilevavenu venoda'a veniqeraa lekhal-adam
ki veyadu'a sheatem igeret hamashicha 'arukha 'al-yedey sherutenu ketuva lo videyo ki im-berucha elohim chayim velo 'al-luchot even ki im-'al-luchot basar luchot halev
veze vitechonenu 'al-yedey hamashicha lifeney haelohim
lo-shekesherim anachenu me'atsemenu ladin ki khisheronenu meet haelohim
vehu hikheshir otanu limesharatey berit chadasha lo shel-haotiot ela shel-harucha ki-haot tamit veharucha yechaye
veim-sherut hamavet hecharut beotiot 'al-haeven nirea bekhavod 'ad-shel yakhelu beney yiserael lehabit el-peney mshe mipeney kevod panayv habatel
kevod sherut harucha kama yigedal kevodo
ki im-hasherut asher lechayev kavod hu hasherut asher lezakot kama ye'edaf bekhavod
ki af-mah-shenitan bekhavod kamida hahi kevodo kheayin le'umat hakavod hana'ale haze
ki im-hadavar habatel yesh-lo cheleq bekhavod hadavar haqayam 'al-achat kama vekhama
'al-ken biheyot lanu tiqeva katiqeva hazot pitechon pe rav lanu
velo khemshe asher natan maseve 'al-panayv pen-yabitu beney yiserael el-sof mah-shesofo lehibatel
aval nitametemu de'oteyhem ki 'ad-hayom haze beqaream haberit hayeshana nishear hamaseve hahu velo-gula 'aleyha ki lo yusar ki im-bamashicha
'ad-hayom haze hem qoreim et-mshe vehamaseve munach 'al-libam
akh be'et shuvam el-haadon yusar hamaseve
haadon hu harucha uvaasher rucha haadon sham cherut
vaanachenu khulanu roim bamarea et-kevod haadon ufaneynu megulim venitehapekh le'etsem demut hahi mikavod lekhavod kemi shemitechalef meet adon harucha
'al-ken biheyot lanu hasherut haze kaasher chunanu lo nechat
ki maasenu besiterey vshet shel lehitenaheg keminehag 'arema velo le'aqem et-devar haelohim ela nigelinu neged da'at kal-beney adam lifeney haelohim behareot haemet
veim-ne'elama besoratenu ne'elama hi min-haovedim
asher el ha'olam haze 'iver bahem et-macheshevot chaserey haemuna levileti zerocha lahem nogah besorat kevod hamashicha asher hu tselem haelohim
ki lo otanu makherizim anachenu ki im-et-hamashicha yeshu'a lemor hu haadon vaanachenu 'avedeykhem lema'an yeshu'a
ki haelohim asher amar vayofa' or mechshekh hu hofi'a belibenu lehafits or da'at kevod haelohim asher bifeney hamashicha
vehaotsar haze lanu bikheley chares lema'an asher-tiheye hagevura hayetera lelohim velo meitanu
nilechatsim anachenu bakol velo nidekaim doagim velo noashim
niredafim velo netushim mushelakhim velo ovedim
venoseim bekhal-'et mitat haadon yeshu'a bigeviyatenu lema'an yigalu gam-chayey yeshu'a bigeviyatenu
ki anachenu hachayim mesurim tamid lamavet ba'avur yeshu'a lema'an yigalu gam-chayey yeshu'a bivesarenu besar hatemuta
lakhen banu yeemats hamavet uvakhem hachayim
uviheyot lanu harucha hahu shel-haemuna kadavar hakatuv heemaneti ki-adaber gam-anachenu naamin ve'al-ken nedaber
baasher yada'enu ki hame'ir et-haadon yeshu'a ya'ir gam-otanu 'im-yeshu'a veya'amidenu 'imakhem
ki khal-zot lema'anekhem lema'an asher-yirebe hachesed 'al-yedey rabim vetiferots hatoda likhevod haelohim
'al-ken lo nechat veaf im-yikhele vanu haadam hachitson hine haadam hapenimi yitechadesh yom yom
ki lachatsenu shehu qal veeyno ela leraga' yavi lanu kevod 'olamim gadol varav 'ad-limeod
baasher lo netsape el-hadevarim hanireim ki im-el-asher eynam nireim ki hanireim lesha'a hema vaasher eynam nireim qayamim le'olam
hen yada'enu ki behares beyt aholenu asher baarets yesh-lanu vineyan meet haelohim bayit asher eynenu ma'ase yadayim vehu qayam le'olam bashamayim
ki gam-'ata neenachim venikhesafim anachenu lehite'atef beveytenu asher min-hashamayim
uvilevad sheacharey levashenuhu lo nimatse 'arumim
ki beaholenu ze neanach tachat hamasa miteavim lehite'atef velo lifeshot lema'an yevula' hamavet 'al-yedey hachayim
velohim tiqen otanu lekhakh asher gam-natan lanu et-rucho le'eravon
lakhen betuchim anachenu bekhal-'et veyode'im ki khal-'od shemoshavenu vaguf rechoqim anachenu min-haadon
ki veemuna nitehalekh velo bireut 'eynayim
aval betuchim anachenu vehatov be'eyneynu lehiteracheq min-haguf veliheyot qerovim el-haadon
velakhen im-qerovim anachenu im-rechoqim nishetadel limetso chen be'eynayv
ki khulanu 'atidim leheraot lifeney khise-din hamashicha lema'an yisa ish kefa'olo bechayey gufo im-tov veim-ra'
ve'ata ya'an asher yireat adonay leneged 'eyneynu nedaber 'al-lev beney adam velelohim anachenu geluyim vaaqave ki-geluyim anachenu gam bemada'akhem
ki eyn anachenu mishetabechim shenit lifeneykhem ki im mametsiim lakhem maqom lehitepaer banu keneged hamitepaarim bifeneyhem velo velibam
ki im-hishetaga'enu hishetaga'enu lelohim veim-hisekalenu hisekalenu lakhem
ki-achuzey ahavat hamashicha anachenu hadanim sheim-met echad be'ad kulam kulam metu
uve'ad kulam met lema'an lo-yicheyu hachayim 'od lenafesham ki im-laasher met veqam ba'adam
lakhen me'ata anachenu lo-neda' ish min-habasar vegam im-yada'enu et-hamashicha min-habasar me'ata lo-neda'ehu 'od
lakhen mi shehu vamashicha beriya chadasha hu harishonot 'avaru hine hakol na'aso chadashot
vehakol meet haelohim hameratse otanu le'atsemo 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha vayiten-lanu sherut haritsuy
ya'an asher elohim haya vamashicha meratse et-ha'olam le'atsemo velo-chashav lahem et-pishe'eyhem vayasem banu et-devar haritsuy
uvekhen melitsey hamashicha anachenu vehaelohim mazehir etekhem 'al-yadenu nevaqesh mikem be'ad hamashicha hitekaperu-na lelohim
ki et-asher lo-yada' chataa oto 'asa lachataa ba'adenu lema'an niheyeh-bo anachenu letsideqat elohim
vaanachenu ke'ozerim lo nazehira etekhem shel teqabelu chesed elohim vehaya lariq
ki hu omer be'et ratson 'anitikha uveyom yeshu'a 'azaretikha hine 'ata 'et ratson hine 'ata yom yeshu'a
veeyn anachenu notenim mikheshol bimeuma pen-yiheye sherutenu lineatsa
ki im-nerae vekhal-davar kimesharatey elohim besavelanut raba belachats uvetsarot uvimetsuqot
bemakot uvemoserot uvimehumot bitelaot bisheqidot uvetsomot
betahora uveda'at uveorekh rucha uvechesed uverucha haqodesh uveahava lo tsevu'a
bidevar haemet uvigevurat elohim bikheli nesheq hatsedaqa miyamin umisemol
bekhavod uveqalon beshem-ra' uveshem-tov kemate'im veneemanim
keeynam yedu'im vegam-yedu'im kemetim vehinenu chayim kimeyusarim velo mumatim
kene'etsavim uvekhal-'et semechim kerashim uma'ashirey rabim kemi sheeyn-lahem-meuma veyesh lahem kol
pinu patucha lakhem aneshey qorinetos verachav libenu
lo-tsar lakhem hamaqom banu akhe-tsar hamaqom bime'eykhem
vehaya ze gemuli kedaber el-banim anokhi medaber im-tarechivu levavekhem gam-atem
al-tiheyu mshekhim be'ol 'im-chaserey emuna ki ey-zo chevera latsedaqa 'im-ha'avela umah-laor et-hachshekh
ey-zo hasekama lamashicha 'im-beliya'al o me cheleq hamaamin 'im-sheeynenu maamin
veey-ze qesher yesh leheykhal elohim 'im-haelilim ki-atem heykhal elohim chayim kemo sheamar haelohim veshakhaneti vehitehalakheti betokham vehayiti lahem lelohim vehem yiheyu-li la'am
'al-ken tseu mitokham vehibaru neum-yeho vetame al-tiga'u vaani aqabets etekhem
vehayiti lakhem leav veatem tiheyu-li levanim ulevanot neum-yeho tsevaot
lakhen chavivay biheyot lanu hahavetachot haele netahara et-'atsemenu mikal-cheleat basar varucha lehashelim qedushatenu beyireat elohim
tenu-lanu maqom bilevavekhem lo chamasenu ish lo chibalenu ish lo 'ashaqenu ish
eyneni medaber lechayev ki khevar amareti sheatem belibenu lamut yachad velicheyot yachad
rav bitechoni 'aleykhem raba tehilati vakhem maleti nechama sava'eti semachot bekhal-tsaratenu
ki gam-bevoenu el-maqedoneya lo-hayeta maregee'a livesarenu raq-nilechatsenu vakol michuts milechamot umibayit eyma
aval haelohim hamenachem et-hashefalim nicham otanu bevo titos
velo bevoo vilevad ela vanechama asher nucham bakhem ki higid lanu et-teshuqatekhem veet-evelekhem veet-qineatekhem li uvekhen hosafeti lisemocha
ki gam-im-he'etsaveti etekhem beigareti eyneni mitecharet gam ki-hayiti mitecharet bireoti ki-haigeret hahi he'etsiva etekhem veaf im-lesha'a
'ata ani samecha lo 'al-asher ne'etsavetem ki im-'al-asher ne'etsavetem liteshuva ki ne'etsavetem kiretson elohim kedey shel-tinazequ vimeuma 'al-yadeynu
ki ha'atsevet shehi kiretson elohim goremet teshuva lishu'a asher ish lo yitecharet 'aleyha ve'atsevat ha'olam mevia lidey mita

ki reu-na et asher-ne'etsavetem kiretson elohim kama hevi etekhem lidey zerizut velidey hitenatselut velidey rogez velidey yirea velidey teshuqa velidey qinea velidey neqama uvakol hokhachetem ki-neqiyim atem badavar hahu
lakhen gam im-kataveti lakhem lo khataveti ba'avur ha'olev velo ba'avur hane'elav raq lema'an tigale vetokhakhem zerizut shelakhem ba'adenu lifeney haelohim
uva'avur-zot nuchamenu venechamatekhem ve'od simecha yetera hayeta lanu besimechat titos ki-hunach da'eto 'al-yedey khulekhem
ki bemah-shehitehalaleti lefanayv bakhem lo nikhelameti ki kaasher dibarenu aleykhem hakol beemet ken gam-tehilatenu lifeney titos hayeta emet
ume'ayv yehemu lakhem yoter bezakhero et-mishema'at kulekhem veet asher qibaletem oto beyirea uvacharada
lakhen ani samecha ki vekhal-davar yeemats libi bakhem
vehinenu modi'im etekhem echay et-chesed elohim hana'ase biqehilot maqedoneya
ki berav-niseyon tsaratam raveta simechatam veshifelut 'aniutam he'eedifa lehareot 'sher tumatam
ki me'id anokhi asher kekhocham veyoter mikocham hitenadavu
vayevaqeshu mimenu berav-tachanunim lehishetatef bigemilut chesed shelahem le'ezerat haqedshim
velo kaasher hochalenu natanu ki et-nafesham natenu laadon batechila vegam-lanu biretson haelohim
'al-ken zerazenu et-titos shegam-yigemor bakhem kaasher hechel et-gemilut hachesed hazot
ve'ata kaasher hotaretem bakol beemuna uvedibur uveda'at uvekhal-zerizut uveahavatekhem otanu ken gam-totiru bachesed haze
veeyneni omer ken kimetsave ki im-livechon 'al-yedey zerizut acherim et-ahavatekhem im emet hi
ki-yode'im atem et-chesed adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha shebiheyoto 'ashir na'asa rash ba'avurekhem lema'an ta'ashiru 'al-yedey risho
umechave ani et-da'eti ki tov lakhem acharey asher hiqedametem bashana she'avera lo la'asot bilevad ki gam-la'asot bechefets levavekhem
'ata hashelimu et-hama'ase lema'an kaasher hitenadavetem la'asot ken gam-tigemeru kaasher timetsa yedekhem
ki biheyot leish rucha nediva retsuya hi lefi mah-sheyesh-lo velo-lefi mah-sheeyn lo
ki lo shetiheye laacherim revacha velakhem machesor ela yemale yiterekhem ba'et hazot bashave et-machesoram
lema'an yiheye gam-yiteram lemale machesorekhem kedey lehasheot
kakatuv lo he'edif hamarebe vehamame'it lo hechesir
vetodot lelohim hanoten gam-belev titos lisheqod 'aleykhem kasheqida hazot
ki shama' levaqashatenu uvisheqidato hayetera halakh aleykhem liretsono
ve'imo yachedav shalachenu haach asher yatsa lo shem tov babesora bekhal-haqehilot
velo 'od ela shehaqehilot gam-bacharu vo lalekhet itanu lehavi hachesed haze hagavuy 'al-yadeynu likhevod haadon uleamets levavenu
venishamer bazot shel yotsi ish 'aleynu diba ra'a beshife'at hamatana hazot hagevuya 'al-yadeynu
ki-mashegichim anachenu 'al-hatov lo lifeney haadon bilevad ela gam-lifeney haadam
veshalachenu 'imahem et-achinu asher bachanu et-sheqidato pe'amim rabot bidevarim harebe ve'ata hu shaqud 'od yoter berov bitechono 'aleykhem
vetitos halo hu chaveri ve'ozeri vakhem veacheynu halo hem sheluchey haqehilot vetifeeret hamashicha
'al-ken hareu vehokhichu lahem bifeney haqehilot et-ahavatekhem veet-tehilatenu bakhem
amenam eyn-tsorekh li sheekhetov aleykhem 'al-devar hasherut le'ezerat haqedshim
ki yada'eti et-nedivatekhem asher 'aleyha ani mitehalel bakhem lifeney aneshey maqedoneya lemor akhaya mezumenet mishana she'avera veqineatekhem he'ira et-rucha harabim
aval shalacheti et-haachim shel tiheye tehilatenu vakhem lariq badavar haze ulema'an tiheyu mezumanim kaasher amareti
shel yavou iti anashim mimaqedoneya velo yimetseu etekhem mezumanim venevosh anachenu velo omar atem mehabitachon haze asher hitehalalenu vo
'al-ken raiti levaqesh min-haachim ki-yeqademu lavo aleykhem veyakhinu et-birekhatekhem hameyu'ada milefanim lema'an tiheye mukhenet ke'eyn berakha velo ke'eyn matenat kilay
ki hine hazore'a betsimetsum yiqetsor betsimetsum vehazore'a biverakhot yiqetsor biverakhot
vekhal-ish kaasher yidevenu libo lo-ve'ayin ra'a velo leaneso ki hanoten belev samecha yeehav oto elohim
velohim yakhol lehaashepi'a 'aleykhem chesed sheyiheye lakhem bekhal-'et dey sipuqekhem bakol vetotiru bekhal-ma'ase tov
kakatuv pizar natan laeveyonim tsideqato 'omedet la'ad
vehanoten zera' lazore'a velechem laokhel yiten veyarebe et-zare'akhem veyaferi tenuvot tsideqatekhem
lema'an ta'ashiru vakol lekhal-hatemimut asher poriya toda lelohim 'al-yadeynu
ki-sherut ha'avoda hazot lo levad yemale et-machesorey haqedoshim ki gam-yodu rabim lelohim befo'al sherutekhem haneeman haze
vikhabedu et-haelohim 'al-mishema'at hodaatekhem livesorat hamashicha ve'al-tumat cheveratekhem 'imam ve'im hakol
vehem yitechananu va'adekhem nikhesafim lakhem ba'avur chesed haelohim asher gavar 'aleykhem
vetoda lelohim 'al-matenato asher 'atsema misaper
vaani folos hineni mazehir etekhem be'anevat hamashicha vechemelato asher bifeneykhem shefal-rucha ani betokhakhem uverachoqi miteamets 'aleykhem
veetechanana shel etsetarekh lehiteamets biheyoti vetokhakhem babitachon asher yesh-li lehitegaber-bo 'al-haanashim hachshevim otanu kemitehalekhim lefi habasar
hen hitehalakhenu vabasar velo nilechamenu kabasar
ki-kheley milechametenu lo shel-habasar hem ki im-chazaqim belohim laharos mivetsarim
baasher horesim anachenu tachebulot vekhal-marom mitenase neged da'at haelohim veshovim kal-mezima lemishema'at hamashicha
unekhonim lineqom neqama meet kal-meri raq im-tishelam mishema'etekhem
hatishepetu lemaree fanim ish ki yitebarekh bilevavo lemor lamashicha ani yachazor veyadin bilevavo shekeshem shehu lamashicha ken gam-anachenu lamashicha
vegam ki-arebe me'at lehitehalel bashaletan asher natan-lanu haadon livenotekhem velo leshachetekhem lo evosh
lema'an asher lo erae kimeayem etekhem baigerot
keameram hen haigerot chamurot veqashot aval hu ve'atsemo keshehu khenegedenu chalush venivo niveze
yeda'-na haomer kazot shekemo sheanachenu vadibur 'al-yedey igerot biheyotenu rechoqim ken gam-befo'al anachenu biheyotenu qerovim
ki al-na'ez paneynu likhelol otanu 'im-haanashim hameshabechim nafesham o la'arokh otanu lahem akhen nive'aru mida'at hamodadim et-nafesham benafesham ve'orekhim et-nafesham lenafesham
vaanachenu lo nitegadel liveli-mida ki im-kefi midat hagevul asher chalaq lanu haelohim lechoq lehagi'a gam-'adeykhem
ki eynenu kemasigey gevul keilu lo vanu aleykhem halo khevar qidamenu gam-etekhem bivesorat hamashicha
lo nitegadel liveli-mida bigi'at acherim aval yesh-lanu tiqeva shebirevot emunatekhem anachenu nekhubad bakhem kefi gevulenu 'ad-lema'ela
kedey-levaser habesora gam-lehalea mikem velo lehitehalel bemah-shemukhan kevar bigevul acherim
vehamitehalel yitehalel bayho
ki lo hameshabecha nafesho neeman hu ki im-asher yeshabechenu yeho
achalay tiseu me'at ivaleti veaf-amenam tisauni
ki meqane ani lakhem qineat elohim ki qidasheti etekhem leish echad leha'amid betula tehora lifeney hamashicha
aval yare anokhi pen tiseteyna macheshevoteykhem min-hatemimut asher 'im-hamashicha kaasher hisy hanachash be'aremato et-chava
ki im-yavo haba veyakheriz lakhem yeshu'a acher asher lo hikherazenu o im-tiqechu rucha acher asher lo-leqachetem o-vesora acheret asher lo-qibaletem ki az heytev tisauhu
ulam echeshov asher-eyneni nofel 'ad-meod mehashelichim hagedolim kal-kakh
veaf im-ba'ar anokhi midibur eyneni va'ar mida'at ela vakol lakol nigelinu bifeneykhem
o hechatati behashepili et-'atsemi lema'an hagebihakhem khi-visareti etekhem et-besorat haelohim belo-mechir
miqehilot acherot nataleti beqacheti mehen sakhar lema'an asharetekhem vehayiti 'imakhem vaechesar velo heleeyti adam
ki haachim habaim mimaqedoneya natenu li dey machesori uvekhal-davar nishemareti miheyot lakhem lemasa ve'od eshamer
amito shel-hamashicha bi shel-tikale mimeni tehilati zot bigelilot akhaya
'al-mah-ze ha'al asher eyneni ohev etekhem haelohim yode'a
aval et asher ani 'asiti osif la'asot levileti hanicha-maqom lamevaqeshim sheyimatseu domim lanu bemah-sheyitehalalu bo
ki anashim kaele shelichey sheqer hem po'aley remiya 'osim 'atsemam kemaleakhey hamashicha
veeyn litemoha halo hasatan gam-hu 'asa 'atsemo kemaleakh haor
lakhen lo davar gadol hu im gam-mesharatayv 'osim 'atsemam kimesharatey hatsedeq asher acharitam tiheye lefi ma'aleleyhem
veashuv veomar al-na yachesheveni ish lesakhal veaf-'al-pi khen kesakhal qabeluni lema'an etehalel me'at gam-ani
et asher adaber l-khederekh haadon anokhi medaber ela kemo vesikhelut ken a'oz veetehalal
rabim mitehalalim lefi habasar lakhen etehalel gam-ani
ki-noseim atem liretsonekhem et-hasekhalim biheyotekhem chakhamim
halo tiseu ki yesha'ebed etekhem ish ki-yevala' ki-yilekod etekhem ki-yitenase ki-yake etekhem 'al-peneykhem
lecherepatenu ani medaber chalashim hayinu aval bekhal-asher yirehav ish lehitehalel erehav gam-ani besikheluti
'iverim hem vegam-ani yisereelim hem vegam-ani zera' averaham hem vegam-ani
mesharatey hamashicha hem vaani kemiteholel omar ani yoter mehem yoter bigi'ot yoter limeod bemakot yoter bemoserot verov pe'amim bimetsuqot mavet
chamesh pe'amim laqiti 'al-yedey hayehudim areba'im chaser echat
shalsh pe'amim yusareti vashotim pa'am achat suqaleti veshalsh pe'amim nishebera sefinati vaehi bimetsulot yam layela vayom
bemasa'ot rabot besakanot shel-neharot besakanot shel-lisetim besakanot mibeney-'ami besakanot min-hagoyim besakanot ba'ir besakanot bamidebar besakanot bayam besakanot beqerev achey shaqer
be'amal uvitelaa bisheqidot harebe bera'av uvetsama betsomot harebe beqara uve'eyrom
milevad yeter hadevarim habaim 'alay yom yom vedaagat kal-haqehilot
mi yechelash vaani lo echelash mi yikashel velo yive'ar libi
im-yesh lehitehalel etehalel bechuleshati
haelohim avi yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu hamevorakh le'olemey 'olamim hu yode'a ki lo ashaqer
bedameseq shamar hanitsav shel-aretas hamelekh et-'ir hadamaseqiyim vayevaqesh letafeseni
uve'ad hachalon horidu oti besal me'al hachoma vaimalet miyadayv
amenam nitserakheti lehitehalel veaf ki lo yo'il avo lemareot haadon vechezeyonotayv
yada'eti ish bamashicha asher luqach 'ad-laraqi'a hashelishi ze areba'-'esere shana im-baguf lo yada'eti o-michuts laguf lo yada'eti haelohim yode'a
vehaish hahu im-baguf o-chuts laguf lo yada'eti haelohim yode'a
ho'ala el-haparedes vayishema' devarim nisetarim asher nimena' meish lemalalam
beish kamohu etehalel aval be'atsemi lo etehalel zulati bechuleshotay
veilu-chafatseti lehitehalel lo-eheye sakhal lefi sheemet adaber ela eteapaq shel-yachesheveni ish yoter mimah-sheyiree vi o sheyishema' mimeni
ulema'an asher lo eteromem berav-godel hachezeyonot qots nitan-li bivesari maleakho shel-hasatan lehakoteni beegerof lema'an lo eteromam
'al-zot hitechananeti shalsh pe'amim el-haadon lahasiro mimeni
vayomer elay dayeaa chasedi ki bachulesha tushelam gevurati 'al-ken samach libi lehitehalel bechuleshotay lema'an tishere 'alay gevurat hamashicha
lakhen ratseta nafeshi bechuleshot uvacharafot uvetsarot uviredifot uvimetsuqot lema'an hamashicha ki-khaasher chalasheti az gibor ani
sakhal hayiti behitehalali atem hikherachetem oti tachat asher-haya 'aleykhem lehazekireni lashevach ki lo-nofel anokhi min-hashelichim hagedolim 'ad-meod af ki-kheayin anokhi
hen-otot hashalicha na'aso veqirebekhem bekhal-savelanut beotot uvemofetim uvigevurot
ki-vame nigera'etem min-haqehilot haacherot im-lo baasher lo heleeyti etekhem silechu-na li et-ha'avela hazot
hineni mukhan lavo aleykhem pa'am shelishit velo alee etekhem ki lo avaqesh et asher lakhem ki im-etekhem ki habanim eynam chayavim leetsor otsarot laavotam ki im-haavot liveneyhem
vaani bekhal-chefets levavi afazer vegam afuzar be'ad nafeshoteykhem af im-tame'itu leahava oti tachat ahavati lakhem hayetera kal-kakh
aval im-hadavar ken vaani lo hikhebadeti 'aleykhem ulay keish 'arum bemirema lakhadeti etekhem
haaf honeyti etekhem beyad-echad misheluchay aleykhem
biqasheti min-titos veshalacheti ito et-haach hahona etekhem titos halo berucha echad hitehalakhenu halo bema'egal echad
ha'od tomeru shemitenatselim anachenu lifeneykhem lo ki-lifeney haelohim nedaber bamashicha ulema'an tibanu chavivay
ki yare anokhi pen-avo velo-emetsa etekhem kilevavi velo-ematse lakhem kilevavekhem pen emetsa vakhem matsa veqinea varogez umerivot vediba ra'a urekhilut vegeut umevukha
pen-yashepileni elohay etselekhem beshuvi lavo veeteabel 'al-rabim asher-chateu khevar velo shavu min-hatumea umin-hazenut umin-hazima asher 'aso
shelishit 'ata avo aleykhem 'al-pi shenayim 'edim o selsha yaqum kal-davar
kevar higadeti biheyoti etselekhem bapa'am hashenit ve'ata osif lehagid velikhetov berachoqi mikem leotam shekevar chateu ulekhol hanishearim ki lo osif lachus beshuvi aleykhem
ya'an asher biqashetem livechon et-hamashicha hamedaber bi vehu eynenu chalash lakhem ki im-gibor betokhakhem
ki im-gam-nitselav bechulesha akhen chay hu bigevurat elohim veim gam-chalashim bo anachenu akhen nicheye 'imo bigevurat elohim lenegedekhem
nasu-na etekhem im-baemuna atem 'omedim hibachanu o haeynekhem yode'im 'atsemekhem sheyeshu'a hamashicha beqirebekhem im-lo nimeasim atem
aval aqave shetede'u ki anachenu lo nimeasim
vaani mitechanen el-haelohim shelo-ta'aso khal-ra' lo lema'anenu shenerae neemanim ki im-lema'anekhem sheta'aso atem et-hatov vaanachenu niheye kenimeasim
ki eyn anachenu yekholim la'asot davar leneged haemet ki im-be'ad haemet
ki nisemach im-chalashim anachenu veatem giborim ve'al-zot gam-mitepalelim anachenu 'al-asher tikonanu
uva'avur zot kataveti et-ele be'odeni rachoq lema'an asher eheye etselekhem velo etsetarekh ledaber itekhem mishepatim lefi hashaletan asher natan li haadon livenot velo laharos
sof davar achay simechu vehitekonanu hitenachamu vihi lakhem lev echad ehevu hashalom velohey haahava vehashalom yehi 'imakhem
shaalu leshalom ish et-re'ehu baneshiqa haqedosha haqedoshim kulam shoalim lishelomekhem
chesed haadon yeshu'a hamashicha veahavat haelohim vecheverat rucha haqodesh 'im-kulekhem amen ﻿
